facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 1,118 reviews. Down a lane in Cửa Lấp that most tourists drive straight past.

Nora's Cafe - Restaurant earns that rating the honest way. Local crowd, real food, zero performance for the camera.

If your Phu Quoc itinerary is all resort strips and beach clubs, this is the corrective. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 1,118 people left a review and the lane still looks like nobody knows it exists. Watch what's actually happening inside Nora's Cafe - Restaurant in Cửa Lấp.
